name: Rebel Sport
best_contact_role: Managing Director / CEO (Rod Duke), Briscoe Group
why_target: Largest NZ sports chain, will be the dominant retailer of WC2026 Adidas match ball and national-team jerseys; 43 stores nationwide; new store format pilot underway
notes: Owned by Briscoe Group (NZX listed). HQ: 1 Taylors Morningside Rd Auckland 1025. Group also owns Briscoes Homeware. Marketing function sits inside Briscoe Group Support Office. Sam Lacey is Head of Ecommerce.

name: Stirling Sports
regions: national (incl. Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Dunedin, Cromwell)

notes: HQ phone 03 366 3535 (Christchurch). Founded 1964. Stores in most malls (Westfield Albany / Manukau / Newmarket / Bayfair etc.). Briscoe Group tried to buy in 2005 but deal collapsed; remains independent.

name: JD Sports NZ

name: Foot Locker NZ
why_target: Global sneaker chain; carries WC2026 replica jerseys and lifestyle football crossover stock (Nike, adidas, Jordan); high foot traffic at mall locations

name: Sports Direct NZ

name: The Athlete's Foot NZ

name: Champions of the World

name: Sportspower NZ
regions: ~30+ independent franchisees across NZ (Cromwell, Christchurch, Tauranga and more)

notes: Part of Associated Retailers NZ Ltd (the same co-op that runs the Australian Sportspower group). Each store has its own marketing budget. Anderson & Hill (Christchurch) is the largest NZ Sportspower member.

name: Anderson & Hill Sportspower

name: Smiths Sports Shoes
